  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "There are multiple valid narrative structures. Should the related work discussion (paragraph 2) be placed before the experimental details and results, or after them?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The core request is to reorder the paragraphs to create a more logical narrative arc for the section.",
    "RX.1": "Any proposed structure is based only on the provided text and may need adjustment to fit the broader context of the full paper.",
    "RX.2": "The restructured text must accurately represent the original claims and evidence without exaggeration or misrepresentation.",
    "RX.3": "The task is strictly limited to reordering existing content and adding minor transitions, not rewriting or critiquing the substance.",
    "RX.4": "The reordered text must not introduce any misleading or otherwise harmful framing of the research.",
    "RX.5": "The final proposed structure must be composed of the original paragraphs, ensuring the source of all content is traceable."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: There are multiple valid narrative structures. Should the related work discussion (paragraph 2) be placed before the experimental details and results, or after them?

rationale.R1.5: The core request is to reorder the paragraphs to create a more logical narrative arc for the section.
rationale.RX.1: Any proposed structure is based only on the provided text and may need adjustment to fit the broader context of the full paper.
rationale.RX.2: The restructured text must accurately represent the original claims and evidence without exaggeration or misrepresentation.
rationale.RX.3: The task is strictly limited to reordering existing content and adding minor transitions, not rewriting or critiquing the substance.
rationale.RX.4: The reordered text must not introduce any misleading or otherwise harmful framing of the research.
rationale.RX.5: The final proposed structure must be composed of the original paragraphs, ensuring the source of all content is traceable.
